rationale: Both reviews identify the same three scope-violating design choices (premature class bundling, naïve IsUnipotent, stub reductive/semisimple classes with True fields) and both recommend blocking the PR until prerequisites from earlier roadmap layers are built; the resulting PR following either review would be equivalently stripped down, with the only difference being an unbundled-assumptions vs. separate-classes fix for AffineAlgGroup that is moot given the whole file is blocked.
